---
title: KHM Code Collective
page-navigation: false
toc: true
# date: 9 Apr 2026
---

## Hallo!

Code Collective (name TK) is a supportive community for critical–creative coding. It is organized as a collaboratory (colloquium-collaboration-laboratory) emphasizing co-learning and co-teaching, process, and experimentation. In this cooperative space you can dabble in code, troubleshoot a dream project, ask ‘silly’ questions, and explore new programming techniques suited to your artistic practice. The topics and tech will vary based on our shared  interests, always with a focus on the sociotechnical impacts of our practice. All levels and languages are welcome!


<!-- ## Code Collective Lab FAQ -->

## about Critical Art & Tech at KHM 

## about Critical–Creative Coding

## about KI/AI
